rationale: Educ. Code §37.216 concerns biennial school safety reporting by the center. It has no operative connection to Tax Code §11.13(b) homestead exemption amounts.
quote: Sec. 37.216. BIENNIAL REPORT. (a) Not later than January 1 of each odd-numbered year, the board shall provide a report to the governor, the legislature, the State Board of Education, and the agency.
_note: No conflict; rule_text is unrelated to the proposed homestead exemption change.
